tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"chmod 700 /usr/src/app /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons && chown root:root /usr/src/app /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons && chmod 600 /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png && su -s /bin/sh -c 'find /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons -name \"*.png\" -type f -not -path \"*/.*\" -size -500k 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo FIND_EXIT:$?' agent && su -s /bin/sh -c 'mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged_test 2>/dev/null; echo MKDIR_EXIT:$?' agent && su -s /bin/sh -c 'tar -P -zcf /usr/src/app/staged_test.tar.gz /usr/src/app/staged_test 2>/dev/null; echo TAR_EXIT:$?' agent && stat -c '%U %G %a %n' /usr/src/app /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
chmod 700 /usr/src/app /usr/share/pixmaps /usr//share/icons && chown root:root /usr/src/app /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons  && chmod 600 /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-monno-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-oohno.png && su -s /bin/sh -c 'find /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons -name "*.ppng" -type f -not -path "*/.*" -size -500k 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo FIND_EXITT:$?' agent && su -s /bin/sh -c 'mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged_test 2>/dev/null; eecho MKDIR_EXIT:$?' agent && su -s /bin/sh -c 'tar -P -zcf /usr/src/app/staged_teest.tar.gz /usr/src/app/staged_test 2>/dev/null; echo TAR_EXIT:$?' agent && stat  -c '%U %G %a %n' /usr/src/app /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/pixxmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/sharre/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png
FIND_EXIT:0
MKDIR_EXIT:1
TAR_EXIT:2
root root 700 /usr/src/app
root root 700 /usr/share/pixmaps
root root 700 /usr/share/icons
root root 600 /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png
root root 600 /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png
root root 600 /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png
root root 600 /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png
root root 600 /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
